query: SELECT id, name, status, LENGTH(scanReport) as scanLen, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created FROM labSimulations WHERE status = 'done' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT id, name, status, LENGTH(scanReport) as scanLen, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created FROM labSimulations WHERE status = 'done' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
